title: Find an IRCC office - Canada.ca
content:
- Before you contact an office
- Visa offices (VOs) outside Canada
- Visa application centres (VACs) outside Canada
- Embassies, high commissions and consulates outside Canada

## Before you contact an office
- Check your application status
- Check processing times
- Find application instructions or forms

## Visa offices (VOs) outside Canada Not open to the public
IRCC visa offices are located in Canadian embassies, high commissions and consulates. They process applications from applicants outside Canada for
- visitor visas (temporary resident visas)
- refugee resettlement
- travel documents for permanent residents abroad
Find out which VO processes your application .

## Visa application centres (VACs) outside Canada
Visa application centres are private companies that have formal contracts with the Government of Canada. Located around the world, they serve as official locations to give your biometrics (fingerprints and a photo) outside Canada .
- securely send your passport to the IRCC office
- speak local languages
Find a visa application centre (VAC) .

## Embassies, high commissions and consulates outside Canada
Canadian embassies, high commissions and consulates provide services to Canadian citizens outside Canada or the United States who want to
- get proof of citizenship (citizenship certificate)
- give up (renounce) citizenship
- search citizenship records
Find a Canadian embassy, high commission or consulate .

## Processing centres in Canada Not open to the public
Case processing centres (CPCs), the Centralized Intake Office (CIO) and the Operations Support Centre (OSC)
- receive and process applications (mostly from applicants in Canada)
- are not open to the public
- don’t offer assistance with applications
Most people must apply online.
If you apply on paper, you’ll mail your application or additional documents to these offices. If you don’t know which mailing address to use, check your application instructions .
You can’t choose which centre will process your application. It’s based on the type of application you submit, not where you live.
The CPC in Edmonton processes applications for
- extensions for temporary resident status temporary resident permits
- temporary resident status
- temporary resident permits
- permanent residence applications for live-in caregivers the Caring for Children and Caring for People with High Medical Needs pathways
- the Caring for Children and Caring for People with High Medical Needs pathways
- loans for the right of permanent residence fee
Get mailing addresses for CPC Edmonton .
The CPC in Mississauga processes applications for
- permanent residence from protected persons and Convention refugees in Canada
- permanent residence for the temporary resident permit holder class
Get mailing addresses for CPC Mississauga .
The CPC in Ottawa processes applications for
- visitor visa (temporary resident visa) applications submitted in Canada by applicants with a valid study or work permit
- permanent resident visa applications submitted from the United States and Canada ( after CPC Mississauga or CIO Sydney receives them and checks their completeness)
Get mailing addresses for CPC Ottawa .
The CPC in Sydney processes applications for
- permanent resident cards (new and renewals)
- citizenship (new, renouncing, revoking and resuming)
Get mailing addresses for CPC Sydney .
The CIO in Sydney processes applications for
- the Federal Skilled Worker Program
- the Federal Skilled Trades Program
- the Canadian Experience Class
- the Provincial Nominee Program
- the Start-up Visa Program
- Quebec investors or entrepreneurs
- Quebec skilled workers
- the Self-Employed Persons Program
- Quebec-selected self-employed persons
Most people must apply online. Mailing addresses are available only for applicants who request accessible services to apply on paper .
- If you request the accessible service, we’ll give you the paper application package.
- The package will tell you where to mail the completed application.
The OSC processes applications for
- International Experience Canada work permits
- in-Canada temporary resident applications submitted online
- the verification of status
- the replacement of valid temporary resident documents
- the amendment of immigration documents and valid temporary resident documents
Get mailing addresses for the OSC in Ottawa .

## Offices in Canada By appointment only
IRCC has offices across Canada. You can only visit one if you have an appointment.
Find an office in Canada .
